summary: P1 Admin Content Builder UI + Frontend Runtime Layout Testing - All major features verified. Fixed RBAC rule for /admin/site-design/content-builder route (was missing from adminRbac.js causing 403). Content Builder UI has Component Library (15 items), Sortable Canvas with row/column controls, Width Selectors (D/T/M), Draft Save and Publish buttons. Home runtime layout working correctly - shows custom text block + default content from resolve API. Search L1/L2 fallback templates and generic search working.

issues: Custom text block from Content Builder shows 'Content Builder Aktif' at top - this is test data, should be replaced with real content before production

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /admin/site-design/content-builder was missing from ADMIN_ROUTE_RULES in /app/frontend/src/shared/adminRbac.js causing 403 Forbidden for admin users
AdminContentBuilder has excellent data-testid coverage with 66 unique test identifiers
Home runtime layout integration working - useContentLayoutResolve hook fetches layout and LayoutRenderer renders components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Content Builder at /admin/site-design/content-builder fully functional after RBAC fix. Page types: home, search_l1, search_l2, listing_create_stepX. Component Library has 15 items including Home/Search default content, text blocks, ad slots. Home runtime layout integration verified - custom layouts from resolve API render correctly above default content.

admin_content_builder_route.details: Route was blocked by missing RBAC rule in adminRbac.js. Added pattern for /admin/site-design/content-builder with roles ['super_admin', 'country_admin']. Now accessible to admin users.

content_builder_ui_elements.details: All UI elements present: Page Type dropdown (home/search_l1/search_l2/listing_create_stepX), Country/Module/Category inputs, Load/Save/Publish buttons, Component Library (15 items), Sortable Canvas with row/column controls, Width selectors (D/T/M), Payload Preview

data_testid_coverage.details: 66 data-testid attributes in AdminContentBuilder.js covering all interactive elements

home_runtime_layout.details: Home page loads with runtime layout from resolve API. Shows custom content (text block) followed by default home content sections

search_generic_flow.details: Generic search page (/search) loads correctly with list/map toggle, category filters, and results grid

search_l1_l2_templates.details: Category search (/search?category=konut) loads with L1 template structure - header, subcategories, showcase sections

test_scenarios_executed: 1. Admin login with admin@platform.com / Admin123! - SUCCESS
3. Verify Component Library section - SUCCESS (15 items)
4. Verify Sortable Canvas controls - SUCCESS (Row/Column management)
8. Verify Page Type dropdown options - SUCCESS (home, search_l1, search_l2, listing_create_stepX)
9. Verify Home page runtime layout - SUCCESS (shows Content Builder content)
10. Verify Generic Search page - SUCCESS (list view, 1000 results)
11. Verify Category Search (L1) - SUCCESS (category template rendered)

fix_applied.reason: Route was missing from ADMIN_ROUTE_RULES causing AdminLayout to return ['__deny__'] which blocked access even for super_admin users
